next_steps: Complete rheumatologic serologies including rheumatoid factor, anti-CCP, ANA, and ANCA
Measure serum complement levels (C3, C4) and cryoglobulins
Perform diagnostic sural nerve biopsy and concurrent muscle biopsy for histological evaluation for vasculitis
Repeat spinal imaging (MRI with contrast, possibly under sedation) to rule out structural pathology
Assess for underlying malignancy given systemic symptoms and subacute course
Consider nerve conduction studies/EMG follow-up if clinical status permits
